summary: Removed shadow-only advisory recommendations from the Positions panel so only executed paper trades render there.
Unified open-count displays so pos-count, kpi-open, and cmd-open all follow real DB open trades from enriched.length.
Changed live paper PnL calculation to use actual paper qty, entry_px, and current_price instead of the shadow feed's fixed-size estimate.
notes: Shadow data fetching and Shadow drawer tab were left intact for diagnostics/enrichment.
Scope remained limited to dashboard.html only.
